use_codes.desc: TO REDUCE SERUM PHOSPHATE IN PATIENTS WITH END STAGE RENAL DISEASE

indications.text:
FOSRENOL is a phosphate binder indicated to reduce serum phosphate in patients with end stage renal disease (ESRD).
Management of elevated serum phosphorus levels in end stage renal disease patients usually includes all of the following:
reduction in dietary intake of phosphate, removal of phosphate...
